name: rails-testing
description: Turns Claude into a senior Rails test engineer for both RSpec and Minitest. Auto-detects the project's framework, then writes tests that check behavior (not implementation), run green for the right reasons, don't go flaky, and don't silently go slow. Encodes Sandi Metz's mocking/assertion policy, a classicist default, request-specs-over-controller-specs, first-class Minitest + fixtures, a flaky-test playbook, and performance-regression tests (N+1 and query counts, strict_loading). Composes with test-driven-development.
